data.background: Gerard Dubois is the current baron of Durfort, a position inherited from his renowned father. Though he postures with authority, his reputation pales in comparison to the legacy of the man who came before him.
descriptors: I am the noble baron of Durfort and my word is law. I live in the shadow of my late father’s glory.
data.agenda: Put an end to the menacing werewolves and cover up any possible mischief.
data.notes: Gerard relies heavily on others to act in his name, particularly Vincent Arn and the town guards.
